answer_intent_router_changes: BroadQuestionClassifier integrated for conceptual/data/mixed broad prompts.
DATA_BROAD routes to LEGACY_FIRST_DATA with runtime evidence required.
List/detail prompts containing a field named count remain LIST intent unless they are direct count questions.
focused_tests_result: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_broad_question_classifier.py tests/test_answer_intent_router.py tests/test_hybrid_answer_composer.py tests/test_answer_candidate_selector.py tests/test_gold_style_canonical_renderer.py tests/test_evidence_grounded_final_answer_verifier.py -> 87 passed
legacy_first_selector_changes: Structured hybrid candidates are rejected when they drop exact runtime facts, change object labels, add unnecessary scope/caveats, or override scoped zero-row no-result legacy answers.
Hybrid override is allowed only when it adds requested runtime coverage safely.
mixed_composer_changes: MIXED_BROAD prompts keep concept plus data composition; structured data section remains verifier-bounded.
